objective: Slice F (Policy): Correct STANDARDS.md Section_SOM for agent-agnostic language, fallup fallback direction, both-family planner validity, QA cross-family prohibition, worker table expansion, and add Section_PDCAR functional acceptance auditor gate. Retire expired SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 exception.
scope_boundary: STANDARDS.md Section_SOM only: routing table, fallback ladder, QA rules, worker table, handoff chain, hard-rule invariants, Section_PDCAR section.
No workflow YAML changes (Slice H scope).
No AGENT_REGISTRY.md rows for new agents (Slice H scope).
out_of_scope: Consumer repo changes -- not needed for this slice.
research_summary: STANDARDS.md Section_Society of Minds has three correctness gaps: (1) session-agnostic language missing -- rules use Claude-CLI-centric language; (2) fallback ladder direction is wrong -- current STANDARDS imply falling down to smaller/cheaper when a model is unavailable; correct direction is fallup (escalate or halt); (3) planning authority is underspecified -- both claude-opus-4.X and Codex 5.X high are valid Tier 1 planners. Additionally SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 exception expired on charter PR merge (2026-04-14) and must be retired.

sprints.name: Sprint 1 - STANDARDS.md corrections and Section_PDCAR gate (issue #651)
sprints.goal: Apply all 7 text corrections to STANDARDS.md Section_SOM and add Section_PDCAR section; create cross-review and functional acceptance audit artifacts.
tasks: Edit STANDARDS.md governance waterfall table: add Model family column, both-family planner validity, fallup constraints.
Edit STANDARDS.md handoff chain ASCII art: replace hardcoded model IDs with routing-table role references.
Edit STANDARDS.md invariant #3: rewrite with fallup direction (escalate or halt, not downgrade).
Edit STANDARDS.md: add invariant #16 (QA cross-family required, same-family QA prohibited).
Edit STANDARDS.md: add Section_PDCAR section with functional acceptance auditor gate.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F1: Section_SOM routing table has Model family column; no hardcoded model IDs in session-agnostic prose.
AC-F2: Invariant #3 states fallup direction explicitly.
AC-F3: Tier 1 rows show both claude-opus-4.X and codex-5.X@high as valid planners.
AC-F4: Invariant #16 added: QA cross-family required, same-family QA prohibited.
AC-F5: Worker table (Row 2) includes codex-5.4-medium and codex-spark.
AC-F6: Section_PDCAR section with functional acceptance auditor gate present.

specialist_reviews.focus: All 7 STANDARDS.md text corrections per AC-F1 through AC-F7; Section_PDCAR section authorship.
specialist_reviews.summary: Plan reviewed and approved for all required STANDARDS.md corrections: agent-agnostic language, fallup direction, both-family planner validity, QA cross-family prohibition, worker table expansion, Section_PDCAR gate, SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 retirement.

alternate_model_review.summary: gpt-5.4 cross-family architecture review completed 2026-05-03. Verdict: APPROVED. All 7 Section_SOM corrections validated. Section_PDCAR gate and SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 retirement approved.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: All 7 STANDARDS.md Section_SOM corrections and Section_PDCAR gate addition authorized. Retire SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement STANDARDS.md changes per acceptance criteria AC-F1 through AC-F9.

Section_PDCAR wording changes require cross-review re-sign.
SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 removal is final -- do not re-add without Tier 0 approval.
